name: Community Credit Union Of Florida - Rockledge
description_short: Community Credit Union of Florida is a member-owned financial cooperative serving Brevard County with checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and credit cards.
description_long:
Community Credit Union of Florida operates as a member-owned credit union headquartered in the Brevard County, Florida area with a Rockledge branch location. The organization has been serving the local community with financial services and maintains a focus on member benefits and community engagement through programs like their School Bucks Donation Program and Community Hero Loan offering.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of consumer banking products including multiple checking and savings account options (Free Checking Plus, Student Checking, High-Yield Accounts), deposit products (IRAs, CDs, Money Market accounts), and various loan types. Their lending products span auto loans (including first-time borrower programs), personal loans, mortgages (FHA, VA, jumbo options), home equity lines of credit, RV/boat/motorcycle loans, and alternative products like Quick Cash loans and savings-secured loans. They also issue VISA credit cards with rewards options and provide digital banking through online and mobile platforms.

As a credit union, Community Credit Union of Florida emphasizes member ownership and community focus rather than shareholder returns. They offer specialized programs like the HomeAdvantage mortgage program, CCU Auto Pro buying service, and their Member Solutions Program including Second Chance Checking. The institution provides extensive digital tools including mobile check deposit, bill pay, money management features via PFM, and SecurLOCK card control technology.

The credit union operates with standard membership requirements and provides competitive rates and products typical of regional credit unions. However, as a community-focused institution with limited branch locations, their reach and service hours may be more limited than larger national banks, and membership eligibility may be restricted to specific geographic or employment categories.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Comprehensive loan suite including first-time borrower auto loans and Community Hero Loan program
Member-owned structure means profits return to members rather than external shareholders
Extensive digital banking capabilities including mobile check deposit, bill pay, and money management tools
Specialized programs like HomeAdvantage mortgage program and CCU Auto Pro buying service
Multiple account options including high-yield savings and student accounts with educational focus
Free checking account option (Free Checking Plus) available
Debit card rewards program and RoundUp savings feature for automatic savings
cons: Limited branch network confined to Brevard County, Florida area with no apparent nationwide reach
Membership eligibility requirements may restrict access compared to traditional banks
Limited information on specific interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules available on homepage
No apparent online account opening simplification mentioned beyond 'Online Membership' option
Community-focused scope means services and hours likely more limited than national competitors
best_for: Brevard County, Florida residents and businesses seeking local credit union membership benefits
First-time auto buyers looking for specialized borrowing programs and buying guidance
Educators through their Focus on Educators program and community partnership initiatives
Homebuyers interested in FHA/VA mortgages and the HomeAdvantage program
diagnosis: Best for Brevard County, Florida residents and local business owners seeking member-focused credit union banking with competitive loan products and digital services. Primary caveat is geographic limitation to the central Florida area and likely membership eligibility restrictions typical of community credit unions.
services: Free Checking Plus and Student Checking accounts
High-yield savings accounts and certificates of deposit
Auto loans including first-time borrower programs
Mortgage loans (FHA, VA, jumbo, construction-to-permanent, vacant lot)
Home equity loans and lines of credit
Personal loans and Quick Cash loans
VISA credit cards with rewards options
Mobile banking and mobile check deposit
Bill pay and external transfers with Zelle
CCU Auto Pro buying service and AutoSMART online shopping
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
